title: rosa canina f. hanausekiana
intro: Rosa canina f. hanausekiana is a specific variant of the Rosa canina, also known as the dog rose, a flowering shrub native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina f. hanausekiana are attributed to its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and supporting eye health due to its high concentration of lutein and zeaxanthin. Rosa canina f. hanausekiana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs like rose petals and hawthorn to enhance its medicinal properties.
